---
title: "Examples"
---

## indices
```{python}
import numpy as np

from spector import indices

ind = indices([0, 2])
ind
```

```{python}
np.array(ind)
```

```{python}
1 in ind
```

```{python}
ind.add(1)
```

```{python}
ind.todense()
```

```{python}
indices.fromdense([True, False, True])
```

## vector
```{python}
from spector import vector

vec = vector({0: 1.0, 2: 2.0, 4: 1.0})
vec
```

```{python}
np.array(vec)
```

```{python}
vec[2] += 1.0
vec[2]
```

```{python}
vec.sum()
```

```{python}
vec.todense()
```

```{python}
vector.fromdense([1, 0, 2, 0, 1])
```

## matrix
```{python}
from spector import matrix

mat = matrix({0: {1: 2.0}})
mat
```

```{python}
mat.row, mat.col, mat.data
```
